title: Assignments
content:
The following assignments contain some problems from Prof. Trumper’s archive of problems and solutions (PDF - 10.1MB)
Problems referring to FPE are from the course textbook:
[FPE] = Franklin, Gene F., J. David Powell, and Abbas Emami-Naeini. Feedback Control of Dynamic Systems. 6th ed. Prentice Hall, 2009. ISBN: 9780136019695.
Students in the graduate version of the course (2.140) are assigned extra problems. Undergraduate students (2.14) are welcome to work these, but no extra credit is given.
PROBLEM SETS DUE DATES Problem Set 1 (PDF) Lecture 3 Problem Set 2 (PDF) Lecture 5 Problem Set 3 (PDF) Lecture 7 Problem Set 4 (PDF) Lecture 9 Problem Set 5 (PDF) Quiz 1 Problem Set 6 (PDF) Lecture 12 Problem Set 7 (PDF) Lecture 14 Problem Set 8 (PDF) Lecture 16 Problem Set 9 (PDF) Lecture 18 Problem Set 10 (PDF) Lecture 19 Problem Set 11 (PDF) Quiz 2
